sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.ID, A.TITLE FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT QST_ID, VOTES_NUM, CONTENT FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qstId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, B.FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'y'
